title: passiflora lobbii subsp. limensis
intro: Passiflora lobbii subsp. limensis, also known as Passion flower, is a perennial vine native to South America and the Caribbean, characterized by its intricate flowers and edible fruits. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Passiflora lobbii subsp. limensis include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other types of pain. Herbal preparations of Passiflora lobbii subsp. limensis, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, are available and can be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
